---
title: "Haosen He"
description: "I am a PhD student in Economics at UC Berkeley. Research Interests: economics of digitization, applied economic theory, industrial organization. You can contact me at haosen_he.at.berkeley.edu."
image: "img/haosen.jpg"
links:
  - label: Berkeley Profile
    url: "https://econ.berkeley.edu/people/graduate-student-profiles?page=1"
  - label: CV
    url: "https://drive.google.com/file/d/1nyKfT-gUvxRMHysFLTQnjnwpWU1sC5LS/view?usp=sharing"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/HaosenHe"

output:
  postcards::trestles
site: distill::distill_website
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

<!---## Bio-->

I'm a PhD student in Economics at [UC Berkeley](https://www.econ.berkeley.edu/). 

Research Interests:

* Economics of digitization

* Applied economic theory

* Industrial organization

You can contact me at haosen_he.at.berkeley.edu.
